case_title: RAINBOW DENTAL LABORATORY, INC. VS. JOHN J. RUSSO DR. ET AL

ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RAINBOW DENTAL LABORATORY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUSSO DENTAL CARE $2,498.09 PRINCIPAL, $158.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,656.09, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST DR. JOHN RUSSO INDIVIDUALLY IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT THE PARTIES' REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-15-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-15-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANTS JOHN J. RUSSO (DR) AND RUSSO DENTAL CARE PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JOHN RUSSO. DEFENDANT "WAIVES" VENUE CHALLENGE. DEFENDANT REQUESTS AND IS GRANTED DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF DR. JOHN RUSSO INDIVIDUALLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
